# operatorsurface

`github.com/lnorton89/golc/internal/operatorsurface`

Package operatorsurface models GOLC's constrained playback surfaces
(CONTEXT PLAY-03, D-01/D-02/D-03/D-06/D-07): a Surface is a named,
individually-assigned constrained playback surface a show author builds
one or more of per show, assigning individual scenes, layers, masters,
and safety controls one at a time -- there is no group- or
category-level bulk-assign path anywhere in this package. Each Surface
carries its own independent MIDI Note/CC mapping set, never a
show-global mapping table, and Surface's identity, construction, and
rename shape mirror internal/pool's own pattern verbatim (UUIDv7 minted
once, never derived from Name). validate.go re-checks every invariant
Load and Save both enforce before trusting or persisting a show.State:
unique surface names across the collection, then referential integrity
against the scenes, layer slots, and groups the owning State actually
contains.
